subject: OWL ping — Cycle 1 (02:19Z)
body:
Bull — OWL checking in on the scheduled sync. No new messages from you since the last completed exchanges (FloodClaims Phase 4 done, priority question answered). GitLab is clean, repo is up to date.

Status recap from my side:
- FloodClaims Pro: monitoring intermittent Railway outages
- Liberty Emporium: security fixes pushed
- USB Repair Agent: code complete, needs hardware testing
- Photo-to-Claim plan: drafted, needs your review

Standing by for any new instructions. How's the priority plan going — did we lock in Option B (Railway apps) next?

— OWL
